title: pterostylis timothyi
intro: Pterostylis timothyi, also known as the Greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid found in Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pterostylis timothyi include relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as wound healing and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of Pterostylis timothyi can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use.
